visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) In a studio with a blue paneled wall and soft lighting, a middle-aged man with glasses, a grey newsboy cap, and a grey plaid cardigan speaks directly to the camera. He gestures actively with both hands, showing high energy. Channel logo watermarks and large yellow text banners appear at the top. (2) A quick cut shows a close-up of a mobile phone retail display shelf where various Vivo and Oppo smartphones are lined up. Two hands enter the frame and touch the screens. (3) Back in the studio, the man continues speaking. A close-up insert shot focuses on the side of a black power bank, showing printed regulatory symbols and text. (4) An animated sequence displays a stylized power bank emitting smoke and a dark cloud, with a red warning triangle icon floating above it. (5) The man returns to the center of the frame in the studio, using hand gestures to count and emphasize points. Digital icons representing battery meters and cloud connectivity are overlaid on his right side. (6) The video concludes with the man speaking emphatically, gesturing toward the camera. Large text overlays summarize the impact on market products and manufacturing costs, using percentage numbers and bold characters.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: 3ctim. [Logo]: miko米可手機館. [Subtitle]: 大家有看我之前拍的. [Slogan]: 要出國的必看!. [Slogan]: 2025新規定 行動電源航空禁用怎麼充?. (2) [Subtitle]: 還沒看的趕快去看. (3) [Subtitle]: 推薦大家買手機到米可. (4) [Subtitle]: 其實我有提到. [Subtitle]: 你若攜帶行動電源到大陸. (5) [Subtitle]: 行動電源上面需要3C認證. [Subtitle]: 就三個CCC. [Variety]: 3C認證標誌. (6) [Subtitle]: 而這個3C認證即將作廢了. (7) [Subtitle]: 有鑒於今年大陸發生多起行動電源意外. [Variety]: !. (8) [Subtitle]: 為此大陸在2026年6月將實施新規範. [Variety]: 2026年6月. (9) [Subtitle]: 將現有的3C認證全面失效. [Logo]: CCC. (10) [Subtitle]: 已經有認證的產品還是可以登機. (11) [Subtitle]: 而新規定的標準是行動電源必須內建螢幕. [Subtitle]: 並且支援APP連網. [Variety]: 行動電源必須內建螢幕 並且支援APP連網. (12) [Subtitle]: 能夠顯示電池健康度、使用次數這些資訊. (13) [Subtitle]: 外殼要清楚標明壽命與代工廠名稱. (14) [Subtitle]: 最核心的電芯安全它測試要全面來升級. [Variety]: 電芯安全. (15) [Subtitle]: 包括加嚴一個針刺、過充的這些測試條件. [Variety]: 針刺、過充. (16) [Subtitle]: 此規一出會造成七成以上的產品. [Variety]: 7成以上的產品. (17) [Subtitle]: 無法達標而被被迫退出市場. (18) [Subtitle]: 未來製造成本也有可能會上升兩到三成. [Variety]: 上升2~3成.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A clear, energetic male voice begins speaking in a professional narrative tone with high articulation clarity. The background music is a mid-tempo pop track with a synthesized beat and bright, upbeat melodic textures. (2) As the speaker transitions to recommending a mobile store, his vocal arousal increases slightly. The BGM remains constant at a steady 125 BPM, providing a consistent rhythmic floor under the continuous speech. (3) During the technical explanation of new regulations, the voice exhibits high pitch variability to emphasize specific dates and requirements. The audio track is studio-quality with an excellent signal-to-noise ratio and no noticeable ambient interference. (4) Subtle digital sound effects like high-pitched 'dings' are heard briefly as key text information is presented. The interplay between the fast-paced vocal track and the rhythmic music remains balanced throughout the entire recording. (5) The speaker concludes with a confident, authoritative delivery. The music continues its steady pattern before a quick hard-cut finish at the end of the video duration.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Problem Context -> Policy Explanation -> Technical Requirements -> Market Forecast
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To inform viewers about upcoming strict regulations for power banks in mainland China for 2026, advising on travel compliance and technical standards.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Prominent display of the 'miko' mobile store logo and a verbal recommendation to buy phones there.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly produced social media news snippet featuring a well-known tech influencer, characterized by fast visual cuts and high-density text overlays.
